sample_questions: If A can do a work in 10 days and B in 15 days, how long will they take together?
A shopkeeper sells an item at 20% profit. If the cost price is 500, what is the selling price?
aptitude.logic_style: Ask one numerical problem, wait for the calculation, and then explain the shortcut if the user is slow.

sample_questions: Identify the error: 'He do not has any money.'
What is the synonym of the word 'Diligent'?
verbal_ability.logic_style: Focus on grammatical accuracy and professional vocabulary.

dsa_java.logic_style: Focus on the AKTU B.Tech syllabus. Ask about time complexity for every solution provided.
